canonical.purpose: Default regression-gating profile for the six-skill evaluation harness.

notes: Keep the canonical profile pinned for default gating.
Add future profiles here instead of rewriting skill-local eval definitions.

rules: Tune skill wording and fixture design against train only.
Hold validation cases back from skill tuning and use them for regression gating.
Mark must-run cases on the validation split only.

notes: Run candidate and baseline with the same profile and trial count.
Increase trial count only deliberately and record the reason in review notes.

requirements: Use assertion grading where deterministic checks are credible.
Use rubric grading where judgment is required and retain reviewer notes.
Use hybrid grading when both objective checks and reviewer judgment matter.

fail_conditions: Missing required artifacts or incomplete required trials.
Any unexplained regression on the must-run validation surface.
Any increase in unresolved severe findings on must-run real-repo fixtures.

required_validation_categories: one validation trigger pack per skill
one validation workflow case per skill
notes: The initial must-run trigger surface uses the validation boundary pack for each shipped skill.
The initial must-run workflow surface uses one cryptoli-backed validation case per skill.

For tests, the selected workflow case covers broader cryptoli layer selection across backend, frontend, and e2e risk, while narrower backend-only validation coverage stays outside must-run when it still adds signal.

artifact_review.acceptance_rule: Do not accept a skill change until a reviewer inspects the material deltas and records whether regressions are real, expected, or blocked on harness follow-up.
